languages.text: {n}Техножрец учтиво кланяется.{/n} "Тогда лишь осталось найти путь к Амсанкту".
{n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец учтиво кланяется.{/n} "Тогда лишь осталось найти путь к Амсанкту".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

{n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote te hace una reverencia.{/n} «Entonces, solo queda encontrar el camino a Amsanct».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote te hace una reverencia.{/n} «Entonces, solo queda encontrar el camino a Amsanct».

languages.text: {n}技术神甫礼貌地鞠了一躬。{/n}“那么，剩下的就是找到去阿姆桑克特的路了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫礼貌地鞠了一躬。{/n}“那么，剩下的就是找到去阿姆桑克特的路了。”

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre s'incline courtoisement.{/n} « Dans ce cas, il ne nous reste plus qu'à trouver le moyen de nous rendre sur Amsanct. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre s'incline courtoisement.{/n} « Dans ce cas, il ne nous reste plus qu'à trouver le moyen de nous rendre sur Amsanct. »

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip usulünce eğiliyor.{/n} "O zaman geriye sadece Amsanct'a gitmenin bir yolunu bulmak kalıyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip usulünce eğiliyor.{/n} "O zaman geriye sadece Amsanct'a gitmenin bir yolunu bulmak kalıyor."

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester verbeugt sich höflich.{/n} "Dann müssen wir nur noch einen Weg nach Amsanct finden."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester verbeugt sich höflich.{/n} "Dann müssen wir nur noch einen Weg nach Amsanct finden."

languages.text: {n}技術司祭は礼儀正しくお辞儀をする。{/n}"あとはアムサンクトへの道を探すだけだ"
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest bows decorously.{/n} "Then all that remains is to find a way to Amsanct."
